label: cache proof • the disk-L2 lane actively persists entries during a session
query: Write a four-line poem about a lighthouse keeper who collects sea glass.
notes: Disk-lane liveness: within one multi-turn session the L2 lane must record at least one store (diskL2Stores delta ≥ 1). This row intentionally FAILS when the disk cache lane is disabled or silently broken — that is the point of scoring it; a host that deliberately runs with the lane off should exclude the case, not weaken it. Restore-side (diskL2Hits) is cross-run behavior and is trended via telemetry rather than floored here. Off-CI (needs a local model).

followUpTurns: Now rewrite it so every line starts with the letter S.
